problem id: 21245d76
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(7) XOR NOT SHL(2)) OR SHR(4)

examples:
  00101100 -> 01011011
  11110101 -> 11011111
  01111101 -> 10110111
  11000010 -> 10011110
  00000110 -> 11100100
  11101110 -> 00111110
  10011100 -> 11001001
  11111000 -> 01101111

query: 11011011
predicted answer: 01111111
